name: x-post
title: X Post
author: mcpcn
description: X (Twitter) post card with engagement metrics.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with engagement metrics display
changelog.1.1.0: Moved to social category for better organization
changelog.1.1.1: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.1.2: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.1.1.3: Added aria-labels to icon-only action buttons for accessibility
changelog.1.2.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
